name: tasktrace-mcp-plugin
description: Connects the local TaskTrace desktop app to Codex as an MCP server, exposing your work history, activity feeds, and screenshots.

interface.shortDescription: Connect TaskTrace desktop activity and history to Codex
interface.longDescription: Registers the local TaskTrace desktop app as an MCP server for Codex so you can inspect work history, activity feeds, screenshots, and related TaskTrace resources directly from the agent.
defaultPrompt: Use TaskTrace to inspect recent work history and activity for this project
